zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Albini於1136年之後出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel8901歲，母親Adeliza de Louvain8896歲。她於1158年與John d'Eu Count of Eu在英國英格蘭素可海斯廷斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1188年9月11日在她的家鄉，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Albini于1136年之后出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel8901岁，母亲Adeliza de Louvain8896岁。她于1158年与John d'Eu Count of Eu在英国英格兰素可海斯廷斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1188年9月11日在她的家乡，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: Albini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Pasquale, Aldo, Amalio, Americo, Armando, Carlo, Caterina, Claudio, Gino, Mario, Maurizio, Nichola, Nicola, Severino, Vittorio.
patronymic or plural form of   Albino  .

variants.name: Albino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Manuel, Ana, Carlos, Julio, Luis, Raul, Ruben, Alfonso, Andres, Angel.  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Giovanni, Luigi, Sal, Santo, Saverio, Ubalda.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Albini was born after 1136, in Arundel, Sussex, England, her father, William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel, was 8901 and her mother, Adeliza de Louvain, was 8896. She married John d'Eu Count of Eu in 1158, in Hastings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 11 September 1188, in her hometown, and was buried in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Albini est née après 1136, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel, avait 8901 ans et sa mère, Adeliza de Louvain, avait 8896 ans. Elle a épousé John d'Eu Count of Eu en 1158, à Hastings, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 septembre 1188, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Albini nach 1136 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel 8901 und ihre Mutter Adeliza de Louvain 8896. Sie hat 1158 in Hastings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom John d'Eu Count of Eu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. September 1188 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Albini è nata il dopo il 1136 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, sua padre, William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel, aveva 8901 anni e sua madre, Adeliza de Louvain, aveva 8896 anni. Lei sposato John d'Eu Count of Eu nel 1158, nel Hastings, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 settembre 1188, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Albiniが1136年以後にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundelは8901歳，母Adeliza de Louvainは8896歳であった。1158年にイギリスイギリススセックスハスティングズでJohn d'Eu Count of Euと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1188年9月11日に故郷で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフォウカーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Albini(이)가 1136년 이후 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel(은)는 8901세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza de Louvain(은)는 8896세였다. 그녀는 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 하스틴그스에서 John d'Eu Count of Eu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1188년 9월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 포우카몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Albini nasceu após 1136, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel, tinha 8901 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza de Louvain, tinha 8896 anos. Ela casou-se com John d'Eu Count of Eu em 1158, em Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1188, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ro.Waverley Abbey, Surrey, England: Waverley Abbey, Surrey, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Albini родилась после 1136 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel было 8901 год, а матери, которую звали Adeliza de Louvain, 8896. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John d'Eu Count of Eu в 1158 г. в местности хастингс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 сентября 1188 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности фоукармонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

Se casó con John d'Eu Count of Eu en 1158, en Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1188, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
